sections.paragraph:
Original: נדּה

Transliteration: niddâh

Phonetic: nid-daw'

BDB Definition:

  1. impurity, filthiness, menstruous, set apart
    1. impurity
      1. of ceremonial impurity
      2. of menstruation
    2. impure thing (figuratively)
      1. of idolatry, immorality

Origin: from H5074

TWOT entry: 1302a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
